subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Ponder thou upon the world and whatsoever hath been mentioned and made manifest therein. All servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی در عالم و آنچه در او ذکر شده و ظاهر گشته تفکر نما جمیع عباد
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
